tasks.name: Project scaffold
tasks.prompt:
Initialize the weave project at /root/projects/weave.

Create two sub-projects:

1. `dashboard/` — Vite + React 19 + TypeScript project using the following package.json as reference:
```json
{
  "name": "dashboard",
  "private": true,
  "version": "0.0.0",
  "type": "module",
  "scripts": { "dev": "vite", "build": "tsc -b && vite build", "lint": "eslint .", "preview": "vite preview", "test": "vitest", "test:ui": "vitest --ui", "test:coverage": "vitest --coverage" },
  "dependencies": { "@dnd-kit/core": "^6.3.1", "@dnd-kit/sortable": "^10.0.0", "@dnd-kit/utilities": "^3.2.2", "@radix-ui/react-dialog": "^1.1.15", "@radix-ui/react-select": "^2.2.6", "@tanstack/react-query": "^5.90.21", "@tanstack/react-query-devtools": "^5.91.3", "clsx": "^2.1.1", "date-fns": "^4.1.0", "i18next": "^25.8.11", "i18next-browser-languagedetector": "^8.2.1", "lucide-react": "^0.575.0", "react": "^19.2.0", "react-dom": "^19.2.0", "react-i18next": "^16.5.4", "react-router-dom": "^7.13.0", "socket.io-client": "^4.8.3", "tailwind-merge": "^3.5.0" },
  "devDependencies": { "@eslint/js": "^9.39.1", "@tailwindcss/forms": "^0.5.11", "@testing-library/jest-dom": "^6.6.8", "@testing-library/react": "^16.3.1", "@testing-library/user-event": "^14.5.2", "@types/node": "^24.10.13", "@types/react": "^19.2.7", "@types/react-dom": "^19.2.3", "@vitejs/plugin-react": "^5.1.1", "@vitest/coverage-v8": "^3.1.2", "@vitest/ui": "^3.1.2", "autoprefixer": "^10.4.24", "eslint": "^9.39.1", "eslint-plugin-react-hooks": "^7.0.1", "eslint-plugin-react-refresh": "^0.4.24", "globals": "^16.5.0", "jsdom": "^25.0.1", "postcss": "^8.5.6", "tailwindcss": "^3.4.4", "typescript": "~5.9.3", "typescript-eslint": "^8.48.0", "vite": "^7.3.1", "vitest": "^3.1.2" }
}
```

Configure: Tailwind CSS, TypeScript strict mode, React Router v7, React Query v5, base layout with sidebar.

2. `api/` — Lightweight Node.js/Express server with:
- TypeScript
- SQLite (via `better-sqlite3`)
- Static bearer token auth
- CORS configured for `http://localhost:5173`

Create a root `README.md` and initialize git with an initial commit.

tasks.name: Backend: plans API
tasks.prompt:
Implement the plans API in `/root/projects/weave/api/`.

Database schema (SQLite):
```sql
CREATE TABLE plans (
  id TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
  name TEXT NOT NULL,
  tasks TEXT NOT NULL,
  status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
  client_id TEXT,
  result TEXT,
  started_at TEXT,
  completed_at TEXT,
  created_at TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (datetime('now'))
);

CREATE TABLE plan_logs (
  id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
  plan_id TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES plans(id),
  task_id TEXT NOT NULL,
  level TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'info',
  message TEXT NOT NULL,
  created_at TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT (datetime('now'))
);
```

Endpoints to implement:
- GET /api/plans — list all plans ordered by created_at DESC
- POST /api/plans — create plan (body: {name, tasks})
- GET /api/plans/pending — plans with status=pending (for client polling)
- GET /api/plans/:id — plan detail with log count
- POST /api/plans/:id/start — set status=running, record started_at and client_id from body
- POST /api/plans/:id/complete — set status=success|failed, record result and completed_at
- POST /api/plans/:id/logs — append log lines (body: {task_id, level, message}[])
- GET /api/plans/:id/logs — return all log lines for a plan

All endpoints require Authorization: Bearer header matching WEAVE_TOKEN env var.
All responses use envelope: {data, error}.

Write integration tests using supertest.

tasks.name: Frontend: plans UI
tasks.prompt:
Implement the plans feature in `/root/projects/weave/dashboard/src/`.

Create:
1. `src/api/plans.ts` — React Query hooks: useGetPlans, useCreatePlan, useGetPlan, useGetPlanLogs
2. `src/api/client.ts` — base fetch wrapper with auth header and error handling
3. `src/features/plans/components/PlansList.tsx` — table with columns: name, status badge, created_at, actions (view button)
4. `src/features/plans/components/PlanDetail.tsx` — shows tasks, status, and log viewer (polls every 2s while running)
5. `src/features/plans/components/CreatePlanForm.tsx` — form with name field and tasks (at least one task with: id, name, prompt, cwd, workspace path)
6. `src/pages/PlansPage.tsx` and `src/pages/PlanDetailPage.tsx`
7. Wire up routes in `src/router.tsx`: `/` → PlansList, `/plans/:id` → PlanDetail, `/plans/new` → CreatePlanForm

Status badge colors: pending=yellow, running=blue, success=green, failed=red.

Log viewer: scrollable container, auto-scrolls to bottom while running, shows task_id prefix and message.

Write component tests for PlansList and CreatePlanForm.

tasks.name: agent-client: daemon mode
tasks.prompt:
Add daemon mode to the agent-client at `/root/projects/weave/agent-client/`.

This is the Python orchestrator already built. Add to `main.py`:

```
python main.py --daemon --server http://localhost:3001 --token YOUR_TOKEN
```

Daemon behavior:
1. Poll `GET /api/plans/pending` every 5 seconds
2. When a plan arrives: POST /api/plans/:id/start with {client_id: hostname}
3. Execute the plan using the existing runner (runner.py)
4. During execution, stream log lines to POST /api/plans/:id/logs after each task message
5. On completion: POST /api/plans/:id/complete with {status, result}
6. Graceful shutdown on SIGINT/SIGTERM — finish current plan before stopping
7. Config via env vars WEAVE_URL and WEAVE_TOKEN (CLI flags override env vars)

Add a `DaemonClient` class in `orchestrator/daemon_client.py` that handles all HTTP communication with the dashboard API.

The existing runner.py must not be modified — daemon mode wraps around it.

Write tests for DaemonClient (mock the HTTP calls).

tasks.name: End-to-end smoke test
tasks.prompt:
Verify that the full Stage 1 loop works end-to-end in `/root/projects/weave/`.

Steps:
1. Start the API server: `cd api && npm run dev`
2. Start the dashboard: `cd dashboard && npm run dev`
3. Start the agent-client daemon: `cd agent-client && python main.py --daemon --server http://localhost:3001 --token test-token`
4. Create a test plan via curl:
```bash
curl -X POST http://localhost:3001/api/plans \
  -H 'Authorization: Bearer test-token' \
  -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  -d '{"name": "smoke-test", "tasks": [{"id": "t1", "name": "Hello", "prompt": "Write a file hello.txt with content Hello World in /tmp", "cwd": "/tmp", "tools": ["Write"], "permission_mode": "acceptEdits", "depends_on": []}]}'
```
5. Verify the plan transitions: pending → running → success
6. Verify logs were stored: `GET /api/plans/:id/logs`

Document the result. If anything fails, fix it before marking this task complete.

Commit all changes with: `git commit -m 'feat: stage1 complete — core loop working'`
